main.description: Pin a chat message on behalf of a streamer. Requires 'message.pin' permission. Creates a place.stream.chat.pinnedRecord in the streamer's repo, replacing any existing pin.

messageUri.description: The AT-URI of the chat message to pin.

expiresAt.description: Optional expiration time for this pin.

uri.description: The AT-URI of the created pinned record.

cid.description: The CID of the created pinned record.

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.description: The request lacks valid authentication credentials.

errors.name: Forbidden
errors.description: The caller does not have permission to pin messages for this streamer.

errors.name: SessionNotFound
errors.description: The streamer's OAuth session could not be found or is invalid.
